args.comment: auth-api v5.8.4 and session-store v2.2.9 deployed and verified.

args.text: Credential rotation complete: active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of remediating CVE-2026-30117, auth-api and session-store have been patched and signing keys/refresh tokens rotated. You will need to sign in again. Thanks for your patience.
